query: SELECT COUNT(*) as cnt FROM meal_logs WHERE userId=1 AND mealType='meal' AND loggedAt >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 30 DAY) GROUP BY DATE(loggedAt) ORDER BY cnt;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway05.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3K2x4Mgy2RpvvVT.root --database HZf6zqYa94nKHY3YxXLHa5 --execute SELECT COUNT(*) as cnt FROM meal_logs WHERE userId=1 AND mealType='meal' AND loggedAt >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 30 DAY) GROUP BY DATE(loggedAt) ORDER BY cnt;
